evidence: The paper uses RF importance for feature selection ("top-ranking biomarkers" selected via RFE importance values) but validates the final 13-biomarker panel in an independent held-out cohort (cohort 2: AUC 0.842). The authors state 'Corroborative regression and genomics analysis methods were performed' (lasso regression, DESeq2). Main conclusions emphasize predictive power (validation AUC, sensitivity/specificity) and survival outcomes (Kaplan-Meier curves, Cox proportional hazards), not importance magnitude or ranking. Alternative Panel B (16 CTAGs) achieves similar validation AUC (0.875), indicating robustness beyond importance-based selection.
